issue_summary: Created unchecked exception "MathParseException". Removed occurrence of old "MathRuntimeException". Modified unit tests to not use the base class "parseObject" method because its signature contains a checked exception). Upgraded tests to Junit4 .
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Parses a string to produce a {@link RealVector} object.
     * @param source the string to parse
     * @return the parsed {@link RealVector} object.
     * @exception ParseException if the beginning of the specified string
     *            cannot be parsed.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Parse a string to produce a {@link RealVector} object.

     * @throws MathParseException if the beginning of the specified string
     * cannot be parsed.
     */
